API Collection# Core Graphics Structures

## [Topics](/documentation/coregraphics/core-graphics-structures#topics)

### [Structures](/documentation/coregraphics/core-graphics-structures#Structures)

[`class CGPSConverter`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgpsconverter)An opaque data type used to convert PostScript data to PDF data.[`struct CGCaptureOptions`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgcaptureoptions)Configuration parameters that are used when capturing displays.[`struct CGConfigureOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgconfigureoption)The scope of the changes in a display configuration transaction.[`struct CGDeviceColor`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgdevicecolor)[`struct CGDisplayChangeSummaryFlags`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgdisplaychangesummaryflags)The configuration parameters that are passed to a display reconfiguration callback function.[`struct CGEventFilterMask`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgeventfiltermask)Specify masks for classes of low-level events that can be filtered during event suppression states.[`struct CGEventFlags`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgeventflags)Constants that indicate the modifier key state at the time an event is created, as well as other event-related states.[`typealias CGEventTapInformation`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgeventtapinformation)Defines the structure used to report information about event taps.[`struct CGScreenUpdateMoveDelta`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgscreenupdatemovedelta)The distance, in pixel units, that an onscreen region moves.[`struct CGScreenUpdateOperation`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgscreenupdateoperation)Types of screen-update operations.[`struct CGWindowImageOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption)The data type to use to specify the type of image to be generated for a window.[`struct CGWindowListOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption)The data type used to specify the options for gathering a list of windows.[`struct CGColorBufferFormat`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgcolorbufferformat)[`struct CGColorDataFormat`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgcolordataformat)[`struct CGPDFAccessPermissions`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgpdfaccesspermissions)[`struct CGPSConverterCallbacks`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgpsconvertercallbacks)A structure for holding the callbacks provided when you create a PostScript converter object.[`class ColorSyncProfile`](/documentation/coregraphics/colorsyncprofile)[`class IOSurfaceRef`](/documentation/coregraphics/iosurfaceref)## [See Also](/documentation/coregraphics/core-graphics-structures#see-also)
